batch_metadata.note: Phase B — visit refusal cascade continues but RF-01 content is sparse. Predominantly Eli-sent. Received messages are routine coordination. Sep 19 police threat (ROW-8261) is RF-05 territory. No RF-01 primary signals.

peripheral_flags.summary: September 19 — 'If you're not there when I get there I'm calling the police' (ROW-8261). RF-05 primary (intimidation/threat — threatening police involvement over a scheduling dispute). RF-01 peripheral: the police threat, if followed through and reported to Olivia, could function as an inadequate-father narrative element (Eli characterized to Olivia as someone requiring police involvement). Context: pickup timing dispute. Note for attorney: subsequent messages (ROW-8268 'Stop fucking texting me') escalate the same dispute. No RF-01 primary threshold met.

ARC-RF01-001.notes: B-029 produces no RF-01 primary signals. 175 messages (Sep 13 – Oct 30 2025) — Received messages sparse and predominantly routine. Oct 2025 is cooperative overall: school coordination, birthday parties (ROW-8296-8297), Halloween coordination (ROW-8402-8403).
